display.purpose: Landing page hero headlines and section titles. Playfair Display italic, never in creation studio UI.

body.purpose: All UI text, form labels, descriptions, placeholder copy. Plus Jakarta Sans at 0.875rem.

label.purpose: Navigation labels, timestamps, metadata, eyebrow tags. JetBrains Mono uppercase at 0.625rem with 0.15em tracking.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Default card shadow. Warm brown undertone, like dark oak on felt.

shadows.name: card-elevated
shadows.purpose: Card hover state. Deepens and spreads with warm undertone.

shadows.name: inset-highlight
shadows.purpose: Inner card core top-edge light catch. Simulates physical edge refraction.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition easing for hover states, card reveals, and button feedback.

motion.name: button-press
motion.purpose: Button active state: scale(0.98) + translateY(1px). Simulates a physical key press.

motion.name: shimmer-reveal
motion.purpose: Bottom-edge brass gradient line fade-in on card hover.

motion.name: stagger-enter
motion.purpose: List and grid item entrance, staggered by 80ms per child.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Pill shape with brass gradient background. Used for generation, upload, and navigation CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #d4a853 0%, #e8c267 50%, #c49a3c 100%); color: #0d0d0d; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.8125rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 14px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; transition: transform 0.1s ease-out, box-shadow 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 48px rgba(212,168,83,0.3), 0 4px 24px rgba(212,168,83,0.15); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98) translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #1c1c1c; color: #666; cursor: not-allowed; box-shadow: none; transform: none; } .ds-btn-icon-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.12); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-icon-wrap { transform: translateX(3px) translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Double-Bezel Card
components.description: The standard surface container. Nested outer shell + inner core architecture with warm-tinted shadow and metallic border.
components.html: Card content
components.css: .ds-card-outer { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(180,150,90,0.15); border-radius: 1.5rem; padding: 5px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(42,26,8,0.45), 0 4px 16px rgba(42,26,8,0.35); transition: box-shadow 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1), border-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-card-outer:hover { box-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(42,26,8,0.55), 0 8px 32px rgba(42,26,8,0.45); border-color: rgba(180,150,90,0.25); } .ds-card-inner { background: #141414; border-radius: calc(1.5rem - 5px); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.05); padding: 24px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-inner::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 24px; right: 24px; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8b6914, #f0d68a, #c49a3c); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-card-outer:hover .ds-card-inner::after { opacity: 0.35; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Left sidebar navigation entry with icon, mono label, and Chinese sub-label. Active state uses background tint + diamond marker.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { width: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 2px solid transparent; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); color: #666; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #262626; color: #a0a0a0; } .ds-nav-item-active { background: #1c1c1c; border-left-color: #d4a853; color: #f2f2f2; } .ds-nav-label { font-size: 0.625rem; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin: 0; } .ds-nav-sub { font-size: 0.75rem; margin: 2px 0 0 0; } .ds-nav-marker { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: #d4a853; transform: rotate(45deg); margin-left: auto; }

components.name: Eyebrow Tag
components.description: Small pill tag used above section headings and on selected style labels.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; background: rgba(212,168,83,0.08); color: #d4a853; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; border: 1px solid rgba(212,168,83,0.15); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with border, used for suggestion chips and secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid #262626; border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; color: #a0a0a0; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #d4a853; color: #d4a853; background: rgba(212,168,83,0.08); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

narrative.overview: A craftsman's workshop at dusk. The room is lit by a single warm lamp; brass tools gleam on a dark oak workbench. Every surface has been chosen, every edge considered. This is not a factory floor and not a sterile lab: it is a space where precision engineering meets artistic intuition. SonicAI's interface inherits from this scene. Dark immersive backgrounds push sound and waveform into focus. Warm brass gold is the sole accent — used sparingly. Serif display type speaks to the artistry; a clean geometric sans carries the interface; monospace labels reinforce technical precision.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first with a deliberate light variant (not a simple invert)
One accent color, used at ≤10% of any surface
Double-Bezel card architecture with fine metallic outer borders
Warm-tinted shadows (deep brown undertone, never pure black)
Serif display + sans body + mono label hierarchy
Metallic gradient micro-shimmer on card hover
Tactile button feedback: scale-down + 1px downward displacement

rules.name: The One Metal Rule
rules.body: Brass gold appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point. Backgrounds, borders, text, and non-primary buttons use only neutrals.

rules.name: The Warm Black Rule
rules.body: Never use #000 or #fff. Every neutral is tinted toward the brass hue by 0.5-1%. In light mode, the surface is warm off-white (#fafaf9), not pure white.

rules.name: The No-Display-in-UI Rule
rules.body: Playfair Display is reserved for marketing surfaces. The creation studio uses only Plus Jakarta Sans and JetBrains Mono.

rules.name: The Shimmer-On-Hover Rule
rules.body: On card hover, two things happen simultaneously: the outer shadow expands (warm-tinted) and a metallic brass hairline (bronze-to-champagne gradient) fades in along the bottom of the inner core.

rules.name: The Noise Floor Rule
rules.body: A fixed, full-screen SVG noise texture at 2.5% opacity sits above all content with pointer-events: none. Never applied to scrolling containers.

dos: Do use the Double-Bezel architecture for every major card on the creation page
Do use brass gold exclusively for primary actions, active states, and completion signals
Do pair every hover shadow lift with the bottom-edge brass shimmer reveal
Do use Playfair Display italic for landing hero and section titles only
Do include loading, empty, and error states for every interactive component
Do apply the noise texture overlay to a fixed, pointer-events-none pseudo-element only
Do animate exclusively via transform and opacity
Do use warm-tinted shadows (deep brown at varying alpha) — never pure black
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders as colored accents on cards or list items
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) anywhere
Don't use glassmorphism as a default card style
Don't use purple, blue, or cyan as accent colors
Don't use identical card grids (same-sized cards with icon + heading + text repeated)
Don't use Inter, Roboto, Arial, Open Sans, or Helvetica
Don't use emojis in code, markup, text content, or alt text
Don't use h-screen for full-height sections. Always use min-h-[100dvh]
